# terrible_community_general_ipa_dnszone (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `zone_name` (String) The DNS zone name to which needs to be managed.

### Optional

- `allowsyncptr` (Boolean) Allow synchronization of forward and reverse records in the zone.
- `dynamicupdate` (Boolean) Apply dynamic update to zone.
- `state` (String) State to ensure.

### Read-Only

- `zone` (String) DNS zone as returned by IPA API.
